mission.title: knative-eventing: Prototype a MQTT Source
mission.description: Prototype a MQTT Source. Requested by 9+ users.

steps.title: Check current knative-eventing deployment
steps.description:
Verify your knative-eventing version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing
helm list -n knative-eventing 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working knative-eventing installation.

steps.title: Review knative-eventing configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant knative-eventing configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing
kubectl get configmap -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative-eventing
```
**Problem**

We do not have a `MQTT Source` in Knative Eventing, for transforming messages from MQTT brokers to Cloudevents and ingest them via HTTP into the Knative Eventing system.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Prototype a MQTT Source
steps.description:
As you described the process that you tested [cloud-event's sample MQTT receiver](https://github.com/cloudevents/sdk-go/tree/1ed9471c98bdf49bcc1ffe74980c15691beb749f/samples/mqtt/receiver):
> Copy the file main.go in folder receiver, installing all packages
> 1. Start a MQTT broker as they
```yaml
------------------ PUBLISH -------------------

Topic Name: mytopic
Content Type: application/cloudevents+json; charset=utf-8

------------------ payload -------------------

{
    "specversion" : "1.0",
    "type" : "com.example.someevent",
	"time" : 2018-04-05T03:56;24Z,
	"id" : 1234-1234-1234,
	"source" : "/mycontext/subcontext",
	"datacontenttype" : "application/json; charset=utf-8",

    ... further attributes omitted ...

    "data" : {
        ... application data ...
    }
}

-----------------------------------------------
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing
kubectl get events -n knative-eventing --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Prototype a MQTT Source" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
As you described the process that you tested [cloud-event's sample MQTT receiver](https://github.com/cloudevents/sdk-go/tree/1ed9471c98bdf49bcc1ffe74980c15691beb749f/samples/mqtt/receiver):
> Copy the file main.go in folder receiver, installing all packages
> 1.
codeSnippets:
------------------ PUBLISH -------------------

Topic Name: mytopic
Content Type: application/cloudevents+json; charset=utf-8

------------------ payload -------------------

{
    "specversion" : "1.0",
    "type" : "com.example.someevent",
	"time" : 2018-04-05T03:56;24Z,
	"id" : 1234-1234-1234,
	"source" : "/mycontext/subcontext",
	"datacontenttype" : "application/json; charset=utf-8",

    ... further attributes omitted ...

    "data" : {
        ... application data ...
    }
}

-----------------------------------------------

mosquitto_pub -t 'test/topic' -m '{"specversion" : "1.0","type" :"com.example.someevent","id" : "1234-1234-1234","source" : "/mycontext/subcontext","data":{"msg":"hello world!"}}' -D PUBLISH user-property Content-Type application/cloudevents+json; charset=utf-8

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with knative-eventing installed or the issue environment reproducible.
